'''Victory Fleet''' was a unit of the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], and the first unit to use [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory I''-class Star Destroyers]]. It was launched in [[20 BBY/Legends|20.1 BBY]], six months ahead of schedule, as a result of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] victory at the [[Battle of Foerost (Clone Wars)|Foerost Siege]] and the launch of their [[Bulwark Fleet]].

Victory Fleet was divided into two task forces, one under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]] and the other under the command of Captain [[Terrinald Screed/Legends|Terrinald Screed]]. The fleet fought at [[Battle of Ixtlar (Clone Wars)|Ixtlar]], [[Battle of Alsakan (Clone Wars)|Alsakan]], [[Battle of Basilisk (Clone Wars)|Basilisk]], and [[Battle of Anaxes (21 BBY)|Anaxes]].
